name: High-Protein Apple Yogurt Salad
description: Creamy Greek yogurt mixed with peanut butter, honey, fresh fruit, and crunchy peanuts. A quick, no-cook high-protein snack.
steps: Mix Greek yogurt, peanut butter, and honey together until smooth and creamy.
Dice the green apple and halve the strawberries.
Fold the fruit into the yogurt mixture.
Top with chopped peanuts for crunch.
Divide into 3 small containers. Best eaten within 2 days (keeps the apple from browning).
notes: Best eaten within 2 days to keep the apple from browning. Add a squeeze of lemon to the apple if prepping ahead.
